summary: Tested geas schema command group (list + template). 10/12 test cases pass. Bug found: evidence template --role flag correctly adds conditional required fields but does not set the role field value in output -- all roles show role:implementer (first enum value). Invalid --role silently degrades instead of erroring. All other criteria pass: schema list returns 15 types, task-contract/design-brief/record templates correct, ref resolution works, self-ref handled, nonexistent type errors properly.

criteria_results.criterion: template generates correct JSON with required fields

criteria_results.details: record schema #/$defs/tierResult code path exists and does not crash

BUG: Conditional fields ARE added correctly (files_changed for implementer, verdict+concerns for reviewer, etc.) but role field value always shows implementer instead of the requested role. The --role flag does not override the role enum default.
nonexistent type exits 1 with JSON error listing available types
